positive: A minimalist, celestial scene featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a constellation of glowing, abstract nebula swirls. The foreground contains scattered, simple, geometric mountain peaks silhouetted against the vibrant sky. The color palette is deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, cosmic violet, and bright gold accents. Style is modern vector illustration meets ethereal cosmic art. Composition is central, highly symmetrical, and designed for repeating apparel print. Lighting should be dramatic backlighting, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes and high contrast. Use a clean, flat graphic style with subtle gradient depth.
